name: resort-manager
description: Complete ski/golf resort management: rooms, ski rentals/lessons, golf tee times, restaurant, store, guidelines, email agent, and admin approval queue.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for sending emails

RESORT_NAME.description: Resort display name for email templates

rooms_initialize.description: Initialize room registry with all 185 rooms (401-837), tiers (Twin, Corner King, Junior Suite, Onsen Suite), and prices. Run once on first setup.

parameters.name: tier_map
parameters.description: Room number to tier mapping override, e.g. {"401": "Twin"}

parameters.name: price_map
parameters.description: Tier to nightly price mapping, e.g. {"Twin": 15000}

rooms_list.description: List rooms with optional filters for status, tier, building, and date availability

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: available | occupied | maintenance | blocked

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Twin | Corner King | Junior Suite | Onsen Suite

parameters.name: building
parameters.description: Building number 4-8

parameters.name: check_in
parameters.description: ISO date — check availability from this date

parameters.name: check_out
parameters.description: ISO date — check availability to this date

parameters.name: room_number
parameters.description: Specific room number e.g. 512

rooms_book.description: Book a room for a guest with check-in/out dates, party size, and payment details

rooms_update.description: Update a room reservation — change room, dates, payment status, or any field

rooms_checkin.description: Check a guest into their room. Updates reservation and room status.

rooms_checkout.description: Check a guest out. Returns consolidated bill of all unpaid items across services.

ski_inventory.description: View ski equipment inventory with optional category filter and availability check

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: skis | boots | poles | helmet | jacket | pants

ski_equipment_manage.description: Add new equipment or update existing inventory items

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: add | update

ski_rent.description: Create a rental with multiple equipment items. Validates availability and decrements stock atomically.

parameters.name: equipment_ids
parameters.description: Array of equipment IDs to rent

ski_return.description: Return a rental and restore equipment inventory

ski_book_lesson.description: Book a ski lesson with optional instructor preference and skill level

ski_lessons_list.description: List ski lessons with optional date, instructor, or guest filter

golf_book_tee.description: Book a tee time with starting hole, party size, and optional golf cart assignments

golf_availability.description: View available and booked tee times for a given date

golf_cancel.description: Cancel a tee time and remove cart assignments

restaurant_book.description: Book a restaurant table with party size, set menu, and allergy information

restaurant_today.description: View all restaurant reservations for today (or a given date) with total covers

store_sell.description: Record a store purchase. Decrements product stock atomically.

store_inventory.description: View store product inventory with optional category filter and low stock alert

store_manage.description: Add products, restock, or update prices

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: add | restock | update_price

store_sales.description: View sales history with optional date, guest, or product filters

guest_summary.description: Guest profile overview. Default: room + reservation + unpaid total only. Pass sections for more detail.

parameters.name: sections
parameters.description: Which data to include. Default: [room, reservation, billing]. Options: room, reservation, ski_rentals, ski_lessons, tee_times, restaurant, store, billing, all

guest_billing.description: Billing summary for a guest or room. Default: totals-only per category. Pass itemized: true for line items.

parameters.name: itemized
parameters.description: If true, return individual line items. Default: false (totals only).

report_daily.description: Daily operations snapshot: occupancy, check-ins/outs, activities, revenue, pending approvals

report_revenue.description: Revenue report for a date range, broken down by service and payment method

guidelines_get.description: Get resort guidelines by key or category (policies, pricing, hours, contacts)

guidelines_set.description: Create or update a resort guideline (upserts by key)

guidelines_remove.description: Remove a resort guideline by key

email_process.description: Process inbound emails: AI classifies intent, drafts replies, suggests DB changes, queues everything for admin approval

parameters.name: emails
parameters.description: Array of {from, subject, body} email objects to process

email_send.description: Send an email via Resend API. Usually called by approval execution, not directly.

email_log_list.description: View email history (inbound and outbound) with optional filters

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: inbound | outbound

approvals_list.description: List pending approval items (email replies, DB changes) awaiting admin action

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: pending | executed | rejected | revised

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: email_reply | email_skip | db_change

approvals_act.description: Approve, reject, or revise a queued item. On approve: sends email or applies DB change. On revise: uses your revision.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: approve | reject | revise

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: Revised email body or override text

db_browse.description: Run raw SQL queries against the resort database. Read-only by default. Auto-applies LIMIT 100 if none specified.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: read (default) | write

db_tables.description: List all resort database tables with row counts
